affirmations: You've got this.
You are capable of amazing things.
Progress, not perfection.
You are exactly where you need to be right now.
Your best is enough.
You've survived 100% of your hardest days.
Small steps still move you forward.
You are stronger than you think.
It's okay to take it one moment at a time.
You bring something to the world no one else can.
Today is a fresh start.
You are allowed to be a work in progress.
Your effort matters, even when it goes unseen.
You can do hard things.
Be proud of how far you've come.
You deserve the same kindness you give others.
Mistakes mean you're trying — keep going.
You are worthy of good things.
Breathe. You're doing better than you think.
Your potential is limitless.
You don't have to have it all figured out today.
You are enough, exactly as you are.
Trust yourself — you've made it this far.
Every day is a chance to begin again.
You matter more than you know.
Courage doesn't always roar; sometimes it's just showing up.
You are resilient, resourceful, and ready.
Let today be enough.
You are growing, even when it doesn't feel like it.
Good things are coming — keep going.
You can do this.
You are capable of handling what today brings.
You meet challenges with courage and resilience.
You have the power to challenge and change your thoughts.
You can trust your ability to overcome obstacles.
You embrace change with courage.
You are stronger than the challenges you encounter.
You have permission to be yourself.
You have the power to change.
You are learning and growing every day.
You can accept yourself exactly as you are.
You are okay just the way you are.
Your mistakes show that you are growing and learning.
You can show yourself the same kindness you show your loved ones.
You can forgive yourself and keep moving forward.
You deserve compassion and tenderness from yourself.
It is safe for you to be kind to yourself.
You are free to let go of others' judgments.
You can accept the best and worst parts of who you are.
You are worthy of love and belonging.
You deserve good things in your life.
Your wants and needs have worth.
Your uniqueness is your strength.
Fear of failure does not control you.
You are at peace in this moment.
You are calm, and you can breathe.
You are safe in this moment.
You are grounded in your values.
You can take care of yourself.
You can choose to respond rather than react.
You cannot control others, only how you respond.
It is okay to hold your boundaries.
You can protect your energy.
Rest makes you human, not weak.
You are allowed to slow down and recover.
You can notice the good around you today.
Your life is full of possibility.
You show up for yourself, even when it is hard.
You can hold both your struggles and your strength.
